The '''Durasha family''' was a family native to the world of [[Lankashiir]] and had strong ties to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Most were graduates of the [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Raithal Academy]].<ref name="ACPOV" />

{{Stub}}
